creator: freebsd@moov.de
text:
Created attachment 143620
update to 6.3

This patch will update www/encode-explorer to version 6.3. Additionally it abandons the experimental patch, since most features have been implemented by upstream.

Notable changes since version 5.0:

* File and folder deletion.
* Updated design with new icons.
* Thumbnails for image and pdf files.
* E-mail notifications of new uploads.
